Implements and defines the Kraepelin activity algorithm for data logging, processing, and detection.


## Files
- **[activity_algorithm_kraepelin.c](activity_algorithm_kraepelin.c.md)**: Implements the Kraepelin activity algorithm for minute-level data logging and processing in the Pebble firmware.
- **[activity_algorithm_kraepelin.h](activity_algorithm_kraepelin.h.md)**: Defines constants and includes for the Kraepelin activity algorithm related to sleep and light sensor data.
- **[kraepelin_algorithm.c](kraepelin_algorithm.c.md)**: Implements the Kraepelin algorithm for activity detection, including step counting, sleep analysis, and activity session management.
- **[kraepelin_algorithm.h](kraepelin_algorithm.h.md)**: Header file for the Kraepelin algorithm in Pebble firmware, defining activity types, sleep stats, and related functions.
